prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `41ace6b5`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package for `41ace6b5` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_41ace6b5/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_41ace6b5/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_41ace6b5/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_41ace6b5/notes.md). The rule is: odd columns keep the fixed `7 / 2 / 5 / 7...` scaffold, each even input column is a bottom-aligned `8...81...1` suffix, and the output normalizes those even columns by using the global maximum `8` depth above the `2` row, preserving each column’s `1` depth under the `5` row, and filling the remaining lower slack with `9`.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint and discarded the `sonnet45` “wave” framing as an exact rule description; that correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_41ace6b5/notes.md). The generator matches the task family by keeping square odd-sized grids, the same odd-column scaffold, and sparse bottom-aligned even-column suffixes with only a few columns reaching the `2`/`5` transition rows. No new primitive was needed.
